title: Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!
